title: cryptarrhena pallidiflora
intro: Cryptarrhena pallidiflora, also known as the pale-flowered cryptarrhena, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family and is native to Australia. The plant's roots have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Cryptarrhena pallidiflora are said to include relief from pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as potential antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, but its use should be cautioned as it may have toxic effects in large doses.
